promotion_note: Patch A CORE promoted 2026-06-24 (steps 1-4, BYTE-IDENTICAL to v1.5.10 -- structural + telemetry only, no trade moves): (1) C2 shared position builder; (2) run-level engine_health counters in run_metadata.json (opt-in, observational); (3) minimal invalid_fill_policy flag plumbing (default FAIL, inert; the SKIP compute path is Patch B) + signal_version fold-in. DEFERRED (NOT in this engine): engine_events.csv -> Patch A.1 (built post-convergence as the proof the identity tax dropped); H6 Stage-2 fail-closed -> the engine-authority convergence arc (it was a dead check on a permanently-broken resolver -- runtime_ver always UNKNOWN: no VALIDATED_ENGINE.manifest.json exists + dotted/underscored path skew -- so inverting it literally would break every Stage-2 compile; it is genuinely an identity-resolution problem and belongs with convergence). Design: outputs/system_reports/02_engine_core/ENGINE_PATCH_A_DESIGN_v1_5_11_2026-06-23.md. file_hashes below are the PROMOTION (FROZEN) state. Rollback target: v1_5_10 (FROZEN + vaulted; byte-identical -> swap-safe).
adds: Patch A CORE is structural + telemetry only. The compute path is byte-identical to v1.5.10 (no behavioural change). Landed: C2 builder + run-level engine_health counters + minimal invalid_fill_policy plumbing (default FAIL, inert). file_hashes below are LF-normalized (tools/verify_engine_integrity.canonical_sha256) at the FROZEN promotion state. engine_events.csv (Patch A.1) and H6 (convergence) are NOT in this engine.
invariants: Canonical per-bar order (in-position): SL/TP -> partial -> stop_mutation -> check_exit
Partial guard: partial_taken == False AND bars_held >= 1 AND unrealized_r >= 1.0001
Stop mutation is monotone: long tightens up only, short tightens down only; silent reject otherwise
Entry market state initial_stop_price is FROZEN; stop_price_active is live-mutable
No-hook strategies produce byte-equivalent trade dicts to v1.5.7 (and v1.5.6)
unrealized_r (close-based) is UNCHANGED from v1.5.7 — additive only
known_limitations: NO margin-call / liquidation (inherited from v1.5.10/v1.5.9/v1.5.8). Under leveraged sizing (granular_parity / vol_parity) a basket can run to NEGATIVE equity intra-run instead of being liquidated at the stake, so modeled net%/maxDD% can exceed 100% or show a fictitious recovery. Backtest-FIDELITY only: live trades at fixed 0.01 lot are broker-margined and notional sizing is mathematically bounded (the floor is a no-op there). MITIGATION (required for leveraged cohorts): analysis-layer floor tools/leverage_liquidation_adjust.py -> net=-100 / maxDD=100 / ret_dd=-1 when maxDD>100% (trough equity < 0), wired into tools/cointegration_aggregator.py. Ref: outputs/system_reports/06_strategy_research/SZVP_LEVERAGE_FORENSIC.md.
